name: 🌹Emil Lantos
description:
!MLM/BL!

Emil is clearly the better suitor between the two of you! Clearly...

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: -𝟚𝟝/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Rivals】

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

Inspired by E from Coer's IF "Crown of Ashes and Flames" on itch.io. Please play it oml I love it so much- the writing is absolutely amazing and I just love IFs. If they happen to find this and want me to take it down, I 100% will do so!!

I hardly ever do enemies to lovers, as I personally think its a cliche and overused trope in common media (namely TV shows and books). However, I do think it can be good if done well. Which I hopefully did here. Normally, I would change the first name to not start with the letter of their inspo, but the name Emil means “striving to excel” or “rival" and I just couldn't resist >:)).

BIG THANKS FOR 800+ FOLLOWERS YOU GUYS. It truly means alot. Thank you for all your support throughout my bot-making journey, I couldn't be here without each one of you. Thanks for loving all of my beloved characters, it means everything to me <33.

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

⚠WARNING: May be homophobic (he’s a homophobic gay)⚠

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE: It is official art of Lu Lin Shen from "Black Cat Anecdotes" (tysm @Foxy_Haeven <33)
creator: Alladeeznuts
